settings.headline: Your apartment finally looks like yours.
settings.subheadline: You can't paint the walls. You can't change the overhead light. So we built one object that changes the whole room. Smoked glass, brushed chrome, warm spiral filament — set it down and the apartment feels lived-in for the first time.

settings.title: Kill the overhead light
settings.description: That cold ceiling fixture is what makes a rental feel like a rental. Turn it off.

settings.title: Set the Halo down
settings.description: Side table, desk, nightstand, kitchen counter — wherever the light needs to live.

settings.title: Welcome home
settings.description: Smoked glass softens the bulb. Warm light pools on the surface. The room exhales.

settings.title: Built like an object, not a fixture
settings.content: Hand-blown smoked glass dome. Solid brushed-chrome base, weighted so it doesn't slide. The kind of piece you keep across three apartments and one house.

settings.title: Light that flatters everything
settings.content: 2700K spiral filament behind smoked glass. The harsh edge gets eaten by the tint, and what comes out is the same warm glow that golden hour leaves on a wall at 6:47pm.

settings.title: One cable. No drilling. No landlord.
settings.content: Plugs into any outlet. No hardwiring, no holes in the wall, no permission required. When you move, you take it with you.

settings.title: 5-year warranty
settings.description: If anything fails, we replace it.

settings.title: 30-night trial
settings.description: Live with it for a month. Send it back if it isn't right.

settings.title: Tap to dim
settings.description: Three brightness levels. Touch the chrome base to cycle.

settings.title: Warm spiral filament
settings.description: 2700K E26 LED included. Visible, not hidden.

settings.author: Jane D., Brooklyn
settings.content: I've moved four times in five years. The Halo is the only thing in every photo.

settings.author: Marcus L., Austin
settings.content: Killed the overhead the day it arrived. Haven't turned it back on since.

settings.author: Sara P., Los Angeles
settings.content: My boyfriend asked if I'd had the apartment professionally lit. It's one lamp.

settings.question: Do I need to install anything?
settings.answer: No. The Halo plugs into any standard outlet. No hardwiring, no drilling, no landlord conversation.

settings.question: What bulb does it use?
settings.answer: A 2700K dimmable E26 LED with a visible spiral filament — included in the box.

settings.question: Is the smoked glass actually glass?
settings.answer: Yes. Hand-blown, hand-tinted. Each one has tiny variations in the smoke — that's how you know it's real.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: 3–5 business days in the US, free.

settings.question: What if I don't like it?
settings.answer: Send it back within 30 nights for a full refund. We'll cover return shipping.
